systems.system_notes: Long cephalomedullary proximal femoral nailing platform anchored to the official Smith+Nephew INTERTAN product family materials.

trays.tray_notes: Official INTERTAN materials support dedicated long-nail instrumentation and integrated hip fracture fixation workflow.

components.component_notes: Primary long INTERTAN nail component described within the official Smith+Nephew hip fracture nailing platform.
The INTERTAN construct includes the integrated lag screw fixation mechanism.
The long INTERTAN construct includes distal locking fixation options.
End-cap compatibility is part of the TRIGEN INTERTAN long nail construct family.

unresolved_items.raw_text: The public INTERTAN source set confirms the long nail family but this pass does not include a clean long-nail implant code matrix.
unresolved_items.reason: A deeper IFU or sterile implant listing pass is needed for product-code detail.
unresolved_items.source_excerpt: Current extraction remains at tray and implant-family level.
